summary: Test Automation Engineer with 15+ years of hands-on experience building automation solutions across Web, Mobile, API, Desktop, Embedded, and cloud systems — mostly in healthcare and medical device domains where quality is not optional. Led and mentored QA/AQA teams of 5–10 engineers. Drove suite stability to 98% and cut execution time by up to 50% through framework architecture, code reviews, and systematic flakiness elimination.

experience.description: Lead automation for a mobile healthcare platform used by Emergency Medical Services and hospitals for ePCR patient data transmission.
achievements: Own Android, iOS, and API automation frameworks for emergency-critical medical workflows
Integrated automated suites into CI/CD pipelines, improving regression reliability and release readiness
Conduct regular automation code reviews and improve framework standards and reusable components
Mentor automation engineers and improve test design practices
Reduced flaky failures through better synchronization, logging, and root cause analysis

experience.description: Worked on automation for embedded cardiac rhythm device software in a regulated medical environment.
achievements: Built and maintained automation for embedded medical device validation
Increased coverage for critical cardiac workflows
Supported FDA/ISO-oriented quality activities and audit preparation
Investigated complex failures using logs, test results, and integration data

experience.description: Automated a cloud-based emergency response and ePCR platform with complex healthcare integrations.
achievements: Designed and evolved automation frameworks for web, API, and integration testing
Automated regression and integration scenarios for emergency medical data workflows
Reviewed automation code and guided engineers on framework design and maintainability

experience.description: Delivered automation across medical imaging, medical data exchange, cardiac monitoring, enterprise security, and mobile payment products.
achievements: Built automation frameworks for web, mobile, API, integration, and desktop applications
Led QA/AQA teams of up to 10 engineers including mentoring, interviews, and code reviews
Improved regression coverage and reduced manual verification effort

experience.description: Started test automation career in medical and financial systems, including cardiac rhythm stimulator applications and mobile wallet solutions.
achievements: Automated WPF-based medical applications and cross-platform iOS/Android payment workflows
Built functional and regression test suites for patient-critical systems
Led a 5-person QA team during mobile wallet testing

projects.name: Healthcare ePCR Mobile Platform
projects.description: Android and iOS automation for emergency medical services platform used in real ambulance workflows. Patient data transmission at the point of care — the kind of system where a data loss bug is not a ticket, it's an incident.

projects.name: Cardiac Device Validation
projects.description: Automated validation for embedded cardiac rhythm device software in an FDA-regulated environment. Every test had to be traceable, every failure had to be investigated — no noise tolerated.

projects.name: Cloud Emergency Response
projects.description: Web, API, and integration automation for a cloud-based ePCR platform connecting hospitals, EMS crews, and dispatch centers. Complex data flows across multiple systems — regression coverage had to be airtight before every release.

education.degree: Specialist's Degree — Project Management and Program Professional
